title: No Weather Effects
body:
A simple client-side mod that completely hides all weather effects like rain, snow and lightnings, so it looks like the weather is always clear.

It has an optional config which depends on [CompleteConfig](https://modrinth.com/mod/completeconfig).  
If you want to toggle the mod ingame, you will need to install both [CompleteConfig](https://modrinth.com/mod/completeconfig) and [Cloth Config](https://modrinth.com/mod/cloth-config).

**Note:** This mod does not affect the world's weather cycle, it just hides the weather effects for the player.
